commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should proceed with normal PR review, CI, and merge handling.; Cleared: The diff only changes local backup temp placement, tests, and changelog; it adds no dependencies, workflows, secret access, or broader permissions, and rechecks fallback containment. commands.review_summary:
The PR routes backup manifest staging through a containment-aware temp-root chooser, adds two state-local TMPDIR regression tests, and records a changelog fix.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main writes the staged manifest under os.tmpdir() and also passes recursive backup assets to tar, so TMPDIR under the state asset can produce two root manifest entries before verify rejects the archive.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should proceed with normal PR review, CI, and merge handling.
